items.title: Green notification for tropical cyclone TWENTYSEVEN-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 5417 .
items.body: From 17/03/2026 to 17/03/2026, a Tropical Storm (maximum wind speed of 176 km/h) TWENTYSEVEN-26 was active in SWPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: Papua New Guinea, Australia (vulnerability Low). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 5417 .
